title: VODNIK PO TEMATSKIH MREŽAH ZA RAZISKOVALCE
subtitle: KAKO OBLIKOVATI IN IZVAJATI TEMATSKE MREŽE ZA POVEČANJE VKLJUČENOSTI UPORABNIKOV IN VPLIVA
description: A practical guide for coordinators and members of multi-actor thematic networks under the EU Horizon 2020 programme, offering step-by-step frameworks to design, implement and sustain collaborative networks that enhance user engagement and impact. It presents approaches for consortium building, knowledge exchange pathways, dissemination, exploitation, impact measurement and long-term sustainability through best practices and case studies.
